item.description: Bolt / Nut / Washer set for structural steel connection (stud bolt + heavy hex nut + flat washer)
item.specs: ASTM A193 B7 stud bolt, ASTM A194 2H heavy hex nut, ASTM F436 washer, M20, Hot-Dip Galvanized

vendorShortlist.name: Alpha Fastener JSC (Bulong Alpha)
vendorShortlist.type: High-strength / anchor bolts, ASTM A193 bolts (made in Vietnam)

vendorShortlist.name: Bulong Quang Thai
vendorShortlist.type: Stud bolt + heavy hex nut + washer set

vendorShortlist.name: VETCO
vendorShortlist.type: Stud bolts A193 Gr B7 / heavy hex nut A194 Gr 2H (Corroshield PTFE option)

rfqDraft.subject: RFQ: ASTM A193 B7 stud bolt + A194 2H nut + F436 washer (M20, HDG) - 500 sets
rfqDraft.body:
Kinh gui Quy cong ty, Chung toi can bang gia cho hang muc lien ket ket cau (500 bo):
- Stud bolt ASTM A193 Gr B7, M20 x chieu dai (can xac nhan), Hot-Dip Galvanized
- Heavy hex nut ASTM A194 Gr 2H, M20, HDG
- Flat washer ASTM F436, M20, HDG
Tieu chuan/Chung nhan: yeu cau chung nhan vat lieu (MTC) va thu nghiem. Vui long cung cap: don gia, MOQ, lead time, dieu kien giao hang, va tai lieu chung nhan.
lineItems: ASTM A193 B7 stud bolt M20 - 500 pcs
ASTM A194 2H heavy hex nut M20 - 500 pcs
ASTM F436 flat washer M20 - 500 pcs

comparison.notes: Nha san xuat bulong tai Vietnam, trang san pham A193 rieng.

comparison.standards: ASTM A193 B7 + A194 2H + F436 (dung bo)
comparison.notes: Co trang san pham dung bo stud bolt B7 + nut 2H + washer F436 - khop 100% yeu cau.
TP.HCM, co lien he ro (hotline + email).

comparison.standards: ASTM A193 Gr B7 / A194 Gr 2H
comparison.notes: Vung Tau; co option phu Corroshield PTFE cho moi truong an mon cao.

recommendation.reason: La NCC duy nhat trong shortlist co trang san pham dung bo A193 B7 + nut A194 2H + washer F436 (khop 100% spec yeu cau), tai Vietnam, co lien he truc tiep. Giam rui ro thieu hang muc trong bo.
recommendation.caveats: Can RFQ chinh thuc de xac nhan gia/lead time/MOQ va chung nhan vat lieu (MTC) + HDG. Neu can chong an mon cao, VETCO co option Corroshield PTFE. Chua co NCC noi bo khop A193/A194 nen dung external search (firecrawl).
